cutStationComparison.verdictDetail: Cut path ahead on share and/or revenue vs no-cut at +5y (see thresholds).
Cut path ahead on share and/or revenue vs no-cut at +5y (see thresholds).

cutScenario.note: Salaries on cut station ×0.12, then seedRev+recalc before trajectory

interpretation.layerToggle: window.__WL_TALENT_PERFORMANCE_LAYER__ === false disables talent appeal + stability modifiers in recalc(); omitted/true = on.
interpretation.sharedAdvance: genMarketMP + advance to startYear always runs with the layer OFF so RNG and station lineup match between A/B; only forward advTurns use the chosen layer.
interpretation.vmIsolation: Each scenario runs in a fresh vm context (reload legacy+harness) so global legacy state cannot leak between OFF/ON/cut runs.
interpretation.checkpoints: Half-years: start at end of startYear P2; +1y = +2 advTurn; +3y = +6 cumulative; +5y = +10 cumulative from that baseline.
interpretation.cutStationVerdict: Compares layer ON no-cut vs layer ON+cut for the tracked format station only. Labels: no_meaningful_effect | mild_erosion | meaningful_erosion | severe_erosion | counterintuitive_improvement | insufficient_data. See cutStationComparison[].thresholdsUsed and verdictDetail.
